headline: C3.ai Verdict Highlights IP Protection And Raises Fresh Questions For Investors
summary: C3.ai (NYSE:AI) won a US$23.3 million jury verdict in Delaware in a trade secrets lawsuit against Cummins. The jury unanimously found that Cummins misappropriated C3.ai trade secrets, resulting in the damages award. The case centers on protection of C3.ai intellectual property in the competitive enterprise AI software market. C3.ai focuses on enterprise AI software, offering tools that help large organizations deploy AI across operations. The company operates in an industry where data,...
